info.title: Quickbase API
info.description:
OpenAPI 3 specification reference for the Quickbase REST API.

The authoritative, up-to-date spec is available at https://developer.quickbase.com/operation — this file is a local stub for repository reference only.

Note: Webhook and notification operations are not part of the Quickbase REST API.  They are implemented via the Quickbase legacy XML API (https://{realm}/db/{tableId}?a=API_Webhooks_Create, etc.).
